mapper.select: SELECT SUM(balance) AS total_balance FROM t_asset_wallet

SELECT w.user_id, w.balance AS wallet_balance, -- 钱包余额 f.balance_snapshot AS snapshot_balance -- 流水快照余额 FROM t_asset_wallet w -- 关联每个用户最新的一条流水 LEFT JOIN t_asset_flow f ON w.user_id = f.user_id WHERE f.id = ( SELECT MAX(id) FROM t_asset_flow WHERE user_id = w.user_id ) -- 【核心】只有差额 > 0.01 的才会查出来，没问题的自动过滤 HAVING ABS(w.balance - f.balance_snapshot) > 0.01
